zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: 发布与安装可靠性更新
changes: 新增标准化发布流程，覆盖签名、公证、Sparkle 更新 ZIP、appcast 和 DMG
提供手动安装 DMG，新用户可直接拖入 Applications，已安装用户可继续使用应用内更新
托盘菜单列表更紧凑，普通状态下更容易在较小屏幕高度内完整展示
应用、Sparkle 更新 ZIP 和手动安装 DMG 均已签名并通过 Apple 公证

en.label: Latest
en.title: Release and installation reliability update
changes: Added a standardized release flow covering signing, notarization, the Sparkle update ZIP, appcast, and DMG.
Added a manual-install DMG so new users can drag PinboardShot into Applications while existing users keep using in-app updates.
Made the tray menu list more compact so the normal state fits more comfortably on shorter screen heights.
The app, Sparkle update ZIP, and manual-install DMG are signed and notarized by Apple.
